description: Typed event envelope for the SevenOS System Experience Layer.

envelope.source: core | hub | shell | profile | shield | windows | server | installer | package | user
envelope.type: status | action | preview | apply | error | notification | phase | profile | security
envelope.state: OK | READY | RUN | PART | WARN | MISS | FAIL
envelope.command: Optional command that produced or will resolve the event
envelope.payload: Optional future object for typed event data

rules: JSON output must never be followed by human text.
Every UI action should have an action id in sevenos.actions.v1.
Unsafe actions must declare impact before execution.
The event bus must remain local-only until authentication exists.
UI surfaces consume contracts; they do not parse decorative text.
